sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE products (id UInt32, product_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob') PARALLEL WITH INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 'Laptop'), (2, 'Smartphone');
UPDATE users SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = 1 PARALLEL WITH UPDATE products SET product_name = 'Tablet' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM users PARALLEL WITH SELECT * FROM products;
